prompt: Create a square 1:1 high-energy kawaii superhero comic poster with a glittery rose-gold sequin background and a thin pale pink rectangular border. In the center, place a chibi superhero child/mascot body in a shiny blue armored suit with red gloves, one fist raised in a punch pose, dark brown hair in a big swept-up bun, and a plain centered square face placeholder covering the face in medium brown. Surround the hero with exactly three cute fluffy kittens in dynamic flying poses: one large white-and-brown kitten on the lower left with big sparkling eyes and open smiling mouth, one cream ragdoll-style kitten on the upper right leaping forward with fluffy tail, and one small brown tabby-and-white kitten on the lower right smiling near yellow comic exclamation marks. Add comic-book action graphics: a yellow burst on the upper left with the word “KAPOW” in bold pink letters, multiple yellow stars, black speed lines, colorful confetti rectangles, sparkles, and pop-art outlines. At the bottom, add huge bubbly title text reading Super Kawaii Three Kittens, using hot pink fill, dark navy shadow, white outline, and a cyan outer glow, stacked across two lines. Overall style should be glossy Japanese kawaii, chibi superhero, sticker-like thick black outlines, vibrant saturated colors, cute expressive animal faces, celebratory sparkle effects, and crisp digital illustration suitable for a social media announcement graphic. Keep the count to exactly three kittens, exactly one central superhero figure, and one visible “KAPOW” burst; do not add extra characters or text.
